Class Document

  • java.lang.Object
    • Document

  • public class Document
extends java.lang.Object
    This is my code! It's goal is represent a Document title and text as read in by the CLI CS 312 - Assignment 9
    Version:
    1.0 12/10/2018
    Author:
    Jack A. Cannon
